name: Benguet Corporation
summary: Benguet Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, research and development, and production of gold, nickel, lime, and other metallic and nonmetallic mineral projects in the Philippines. It operates four segments: Mining, Health services, Logistics, and Others. The company holds interests in Ampucao Copper-Gold, Pantingan Copper-Gold, Zamboanga Gold, Surigao Coal, the Ilocos Norte and Apayao FTAA prospects in the Philippines; and gold and silver mining properties in Royston Hills, Nevada, the United States. It also develops and sells subdivision lots; trades in construction materials, equipment, and supplies; and supplies water. In addition, the company offers healthcare and diagnostic services; port and shipping, and trucking services; and logistics services to the supply-chain requirements of various industries. Benguet Corporation was founded in 1903 and is headquartered in Makati City, the Philippines.
